name: tarim-otomasyon
description: Tarım — stok, reçete ve müşteri işleri
author: EMIR ELEKTRIK

scripts.build:exe: pkg server.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/tarim-otomasyon.exe && node scripts/copy-public.js dist
scripts.build:desktop: taskkill /F /IM "Tarım Otomasyon.exe" >nul 2>&1 & set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.build:desktop:clean: taskkill /F /IM "Tarım Otomasyon.exe" >nul 2>&1 & rmdir /s /q dist-desktop >nul 2>&1 & set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.build:desktop:fresh: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ts=Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd-HHmmss; $env:CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY='false'; npx electron-builder --win nsis --config.directories.output=dist-desktop-$ts"
scripts.publish:desktop: taskkill /F /IM "Tarım Otomasyon.exe" >nul 2>&1 & set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false && electron-builder --win nsis --publish always
scripts.publish:desktop:fresh: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ts=Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd-HHmmss; $env:CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY='false'; npx electron-builder --win nsis --publish always --config.directories.output=dist-desktop-$ts"
